title: baptisia australis var. aberrans
intro: Baptisia australis var. aberrans, also known as blue false indigo, is a perennial plant native to the eastern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of isoflavones and alkaloids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Baptisia australis var. aberrans include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Baptisia australis var. aberrans is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried herb for use in herbal medicine, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
